jsonLd.title: RITES is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the RITES family as a Warehouse Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About RITES:
RITES is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RITES!
